mapper.sql: id, order_no, package_id, user_id, amount, merit_coins, bonus_coins, payment_method, payment_status, delivered, delivered_time, payment_time, transaction_id, remark, attach, notify_payload, notify_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_recharge_order
payment_status = #{paymentStatus},
transaction_id = #{transactionId},
payment_time = #{paymentTime},
update_by = 'system', update_time = NOW()
WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND payment_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_recharge_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM t_recharge_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_recharge_order
notify_payload = #{notifyPayload},
notify_time = NOW(), update_by = 'system', update_time = NOW()
WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_recharge_order SET delivered = 1, delivered_time = #{deliveredTime}, update_by = 'system', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND delivered = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
